title: arenaria perlevis
intro: Arenaria perlevis, also known as sea spurrey or sandwort, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). Traditionally, Arenaria perlevis has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Arenaria perlevis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant require further scientific research.
